attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT   RANK () OVER (ORDER BY STMD.DEMAND_ID,STMD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) + SMIID1.MAX_VAL  INVENTORY_ITEM_DEMAND_KEY,
       STMD.DEMAND_ID as SK_DEMAND_ID_INT, 
STMD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  FROM 
  (	SELECT SMD.DEMAND_ID, NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
          FROM (
				SELECT DEMAND_ID, GLOBAL_NAME
                  FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_MTL_DEMAND  
		/*  REMOVED AS PART OF SJPROD RETIREMENT
		UNION ALL
                SELECT DEMAND_ID, GLOBAL_NAME
                  FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_MTL_DEMAND	 */    
               ) SMD,
              $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
         WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SMD.GLOBAL_NAME) STMD,
       (SELECT COALESCE (MAX (INVENTORY_ITEM_DEMAND_KEY), 0) MAX_VAL
          FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_INVENTORY_ITEM_DEMAND) SMIID1
 WHERE NOT EXISTS (
			          SELECT 1
			            FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_INVENTORY_ITEM_DEMAND SMIID2
			           WHERE SMIID2.SK_DEMAND_ID_INT = STMD.DEMAND_ID
			             AND SMIID2.SS_CD = STMD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
	              )

SELECT 
SMIID.INVENTORY_ITEM_DEMAND_KEY AS INVENTORY_ITEM_DEMAND_KEY, 
COALESCE(NINV.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,-999) as BK_INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY ,
COALESCE(NINV.ITEM_KEY,-999) as BK_ITEM_KEY ,
 COALESCE(STMD.REQUIREMENT_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') AS BK_INVENTORY_ITEM_DEMAND_DT,
STMD.WITH_PARENT_ROLE AS WITH_PARENT_ROLE,
STMD.RESERVATION_TYPE_CD AS RESERVATION_TYPE_CD,
STMD.INVENTORY_ITEM_DEMAND_QTY AS INVENTORY_ITEM_DEMAND_QTY,
STMD.INV_ITEM_DEMAND_COMPLETED_QTY AS INV_ITEM_DEMAND_COMPLETED_QTY,
STMD.DEMAND_SOURCE_ROLE AS DEMAND_SOURCE_ROLE,
STMD.DEMAND_ID AS SK_DEMAND_ID_INT, 
 NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD,  
 ( CASE WHEN NIID.INVENTORY_ITEM_DEMAND_KEY   IS NOT NULL THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END) AS DML_TYPE
FROM 
	(   			
  			SELECT DEMAND_ID , GLOBAL_NAME,  REQUIREMENT_DATE , 
  			CASE WHEN PARENT_DEMAND_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS WITH_PARENT_ROLE,
  			CASE  WHEN STCMD.RESERVATION_TYPE=1 THEN 'SOFT RESERVATION'   WHEN STCMD.RESERVATION_TYPE=2 THEN 'HARD RESERVATION'   WHEN STCMD.RESERVATION_TYPE=3 THEN 'SUPPLY ORDER RESERVATION'
  			ELSE  'UNKNOWN'  END AS RESERVATION_TYPE_CD, 
  		 	COALESCE(STCMD.LINE_ITEM_QUANTITY,0) AS INVENTORY_ITEM_DEMAND_QTY, 
  		 	COALESCE(STCMD.COMPLETED_QUANTITY,0)  AS INV_ITEM_DEMAND_COMPLETED_QTY,
			CASE WHEN STCMD.DEMAND_SOURCE_TYPE = 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS DEMAND_SOURCE_ROLE,
  			STCMD.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,STCMD.ORGANIZATION_ID
   		 	FROM  $$STGDB.ST_CG1_MTL_DEMAND STCMD
    	UNION ALL
    	SELECT DEMAND_ID ,  GLOBAL_NAME, REQUIREMENT_DATE, CASE WHEN PARENT_DEMAND_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS WITH_PARENT_ROLE,
   			CASE  WHEN EXCMD.RESERVATION_TYPE=1 THEN 'SOFT RESERVATION'   WHEN  EXCMD.RESERVATION_TYPE=2 THEN 'HARD RESERVATION'   WHEN  EXCMD.RESERVATION_TYPE=3 THEN 'SUPPLY ORDER RESERVATION'
  			ELSE  NULL    END AS RESERVATION_TYPE_CD,  
  			COALESCE( EXCMD.LINE_ITEM_QUANTITY,0) AS INVENTORY_ITEM_DEMAND_QTY, COALESCE( EXCMD.COMPLETED_QUANTITY,0)  AS INV_ITEM_DEMAND_COMPLETED_QTY,
			CASE WHEN EXCMD.DEMAND_SOURCE_TYPE = 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS DEMAND_SOURCE_ROLE,
  			EXCMD.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,EXCMD.ORGANIZATION_ID		
    	FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_MTL_ITM_DMD EXCMD
   ) STMD
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
		ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STMD.GLOBAL_NAME)
	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_INVENTORY_ITEM_DEMAND SMIID
		ON (SMIID.SK_DEMAND_ID_INT = STMD.DEMAND_ID
		AND SMIID.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) 
	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NINV   
		ON (STMD.ORGANIZATION_ID = NINV.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
 		AND  STMD.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = NINV.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT) 
 	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM_DEMAND NIID
 		ON ( NIID.SK_DEMAND_ID_INT = STMD.DEMAND_ID 
 		       AND  NIID.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE )

SELECT STCMD.DEMAND_ID, STCMD.ORGANIZATION_ID, STCMD.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, STCMD.DEMAND_SOURCE_TYPE, 
STCMD.DEMAND_SOURCE_HEADER_ID, STCMD.UOM_CODE, STCMD.LINE_ITEM_QUANTITY, STCMD.PRIMARY_UOM_QUANTITY, 
STCMD.COMPLETED_QUANTITY, STCMD.REQUIREMENT_DATE, STCMD.RESERVATION_TYPE, STCMD.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
STCMD.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STCMD.CREATION_DATE, STCMD.CREATED_BY, STCMD.DEMAND_SOURCE_LINE, 
STCMD.DEMAND_SOURCE_DELIVERY, STCMD.DEMAND_SOURCE_NAME, STCMD.LINE_ITEM_RESERVATION_QTY, STCMD.RESERVATION_QUANTITY, 
STCMD.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STCMD.REQUEST_ID, STCMD.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STCMD.PROGRAM_ID, 
STCMD.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STCMD.PARENT_DEMAND_ID, STCMD.EXTERNAL_SOURCE_CODE, STCMD.EXTERNAL_SOURCE_LINE_ID, 
STCMD.USER_LINE_NUM, STCMD.USER_DELIVERY, STCMD.SCHEDULE_ID, STCMD.AUTODETAIL_GROUP_ID, STCMD.SUPPLY_SOURCE_TYPE, 
STCMD.SUPPLY_SOURCE_HEADER_ID, STCMD.SUPPLY_GROUP_ID, STCMD.UPDATED_FLAG, STCMD.REVISION, STCMD.LOT_NUMBER, 
STCMD.SERIAL_NUMBER, STCMD.SUBINVENTORY, STCMD.LOCATOR_ID, STCMD.COMPONENT_SEQUENCE_ID, 
STCMD.PARENT_COMPONENT_SEQ_ID, STCMD.RTO_MODEL_SOURCE_LINE, STCMD.RTO_PREVIOUS_QTY, STCMD.CONFIG_STATUS, 
STCMD.AVAILABLE_TO_MRP, STCMD.AVAILABLE_TO_ATP, STCMD.ESTIMATED_RELEASE_DATE, STCMD.DEMAND_CLASS, STCMD.ROW_STATUS_FLAG, 
STCMD.ORDER_CHANGE_REPORT_FLAG, STCMD.ATP_LEAD_TIME, STCMD.EXPLOSION_EFFECTIVITY_DATE, 
STCMD.BOM_LEVEL, STCMD.MRP_DATE, STCMD.MRP_QUANTITY, STCMD.CUSTOMER_ID, STCMD.TERRITORY_ID, 
STCMD.BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID, STCMD.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID, STCMD.MASTER_RESERVATION_QTY, STCMD.DESCRIPTION, 
STCMD.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STCMD.ATTRIBUTE1, STCMD.ATTRIBUTE2, STCMD.ATTRIBUTE3, STCMD.ATTRIBUTE4, 
STCMD.ATTRIBUTE5, STCMD.ATTRIBUTE6, STCMD.ATTRIBUTE7, STCMD.ATTRIBUTE8, STCMD.ATTRIBUTE9, 
STCMD.ATTRIBUTE10, STCMD.ATTRIBUTE11, STCMD.ATTRIBUTE12, STCMD.ATTRIBUTE13, STCMD.ATTRIBUTE14, 
STCMD.ATTRIBUTE15, STCMD.DEMAND_TYPE, STCMD.DUPLICATED_CONFIG_ITEM_ID, STCMD.DUPLICATED_CONFIG_DEMAND_ID, 
STCMD.EXPLOSION_GROUP_ID, STCMD.ORDERED_ITEM_ID, STCMD.CONFIG_GROUP_ID, STCMD.OPERATION_SEQ_NUM, 
STCMD.N_COLUMN1, STCMD.GES_UPDATE_DATE, STCMD.GLOBAL_NAME, STCMD.BATCH_ID, STCMD.CREATE_DATETIME, 
STCMD.ACTION_CODE,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_MTL_DEMAND STCMD WHERE 
   NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NIII
             WHERE NIII.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT=STCMD.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
   and STCMD.ORGANIZATION_ID = NIII.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
      )
